title: SimpleServerStats
description: 🚀 Lightweight performance HUD for Paper: TPS, RAM bars, uptime, ping, and UI toggle.
body:
# 🚀 SimpleServerStats

SimpleServerStats is a clean and modern Paper utility plugin that gives players and staff a fast performance snapshot directly in chat.

## ✨ What You Get
- `/serverstats` (alias `/ss`) for a full server health overview
- `/ping [player]` for instant latency checks
- `/ram` for detailed JVM memory diagnostics
- Colorful MiniMessage/hex styling with progress bars
- Player UI toggle (`/serverstats ui on|off|toggle|status`)
- Global admin UI toggle (`/serverstats ui global on|off|status`)

## 📊 Live Metrics
- **TPS** (1-minute average via Paper API)
- **RAM** usage (used vs max) with bar visualization
- **Uptime** (formatted days/hours/minutes)
- **Ping** (self or target player)

## 🎨 Visual Style
- Gradient title lines
- Clean separators
- Dynamic status colors:
  - Green: healthy
  - Yellow: warning
  - Red: critical

## 🖼️ Preview
![Server Stats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nL56WQOZ/images/d5a5b5426c84f30aea32b45316c0765ccb50c769.png)
![RAM Diagnostics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nL56WQOZ/images/4210d6e6ccf14baae26b1991f7058c3c47dc0e44.png)
![Ping Check](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nL56WQOZ/images/995813e9df9ff9dee461c2ce3bb741a7baa4dab2.png)

## ⚙️ Commands
- `/serverstats`
- `/ss`
- `/ping [player]`
- `/ram`

## 🔐 Permissions
- `simpleserverstats.use`
- `simpleserverstats.ping.others`
- `simpleserverstats.admin`

## ✅ Compatibility
- Java 17+
- Paper API 1.20.4
- Works on listed Bukkit-compatible loaders on this page

Perfect for survival, SMP, minigame, and network lobbies where you want useful server info with a premium-looking chat UI.
